you&#x27;re ready to do an insane amount of work just to not even really know what&#x27;s actually gonna be tested on the exams! Lecture format just didn&#x27;t work for me, loads of rambling and tangents. Brief grading was inconsistent and exams impossible (albeit curved).Helpful 0 1 PSYCH389May 3rd, 2025Quality3.0Difficulty4.0 PSYCH389May 3rd, 2025For Credit: YesAttendance: Not MandatoryGrade: A-Textbook: YesDr. Dunning is a nice guy, and his lectures were very interesting. I felt like I learned a lot from this class. Unfortunately, his exams were very very difficult. It was unclear what content from lectures was going to be on the exam, and the stuff that was pulled from the textbook was random and was never discussed in class. The averages for the exams sit in the 60&#x27;s range in spite of the fact that the content itself is not extremely difficult.
